name: airbnb-search
description: Search Airbnb listings with advanced filtering, context-aware ranking, and agent context caching
long_description: A compact-first Airbnb MCP server that supports context preparation, search, listing details, and context-aware ranking for prompt-efficient results. Free-form traveler context can be offloaded into an ephemeral structured cache for downstream tool calls, with anonymous handling by default in non-hardened environments. The server respects robots.txt by default with explicit opt-out support for testing.

tools.name: airbnb_prepare_context
tools.description: Normalize free-form traveler context into a structured parameter cache with tool-ready hints for downstream Airbnb MCP calls.

tools.name: airbnb_search
tools.description: Search for Airbnb listings with various filters including location, dates, guests, and price range. Returns paginated results with direct links.

tools.name: airbnb_listing_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific Airbnb listing including amenities, policies, location details, and highlights.

tools.name: airbnb_search_contextual
tools.description: Search listings and rank results against traveler constraints such as budget, minimum rating, and amenity preferences.

tools.name: airbnb_reconcile_results
tools.description: Re-score previously returned search options against cached traveler context so agents can resume later without reloading the original prompt.

ignore_robots_txt.title: Ignore robots.txt
ignore_robots_txt.description: Bypass robots.txt restrictions when making requests to Airbnb. Use with caution and respect Airbnb's terms of service.

hardened_env.title: Hardened privacy mode
hardened_env.description: Retain original free-form context in responses and cache entries for debugging or audit workflows. Leave disabled to anonymize context in non-hardened environments.

context_cache_ttl_ms.title: Context cache TTL (ms)
context_cache_ttl_ms.description: How long prepared context cache entries stay available for downstream tool calls.

auto_expand_contextual_locations.title: Auto-expand contextual locations
auto_expand_contextual_locations.description: Allow contextual search to derive a small number of follow-up sublocation searches from high-scoring broad search results.

auto_expand_location_limit.title: Auto-expand location limit
auto_expand_location_limit.description: Maximum number of derived follow-up location targets for contextual search.

auto_expand_score_threshold.title: Auto-expand score threshold
auto_expand_score_threshold.description: Minimum contextual match score a candidate must reach before its location is used for a bounded follow-up search.
